title: Rubrik Ransomware Discovery and VM Recovery - Rubrik Polaris
content:
Use this playbook to recover a virtual machine using the "RubrikPolaris" integration by either exporting or live-mounting a backup snapshot. This playbook also creates tickets on ServiceNow using "ServiceNow v2" integration.
Supported integrations:
- RubrikPolaris
- ServiceNow v2

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Rubrik pack (RubrikPolaris, partner-supported).

Inputs — ObjectId: Object ID of the incident.; ClusterId: Cluster ID of the incident..

Integrations/scripts used: Print, PrintErrorEntry, Set, SetAndHandleEmpty, http, rubrik-gps-vm-datastore-list, rubrik-gps-vm-export, rubrik-gps-vm-host-list, rubrik-gps-vm-livemount, rubrik-gps-vm-snapshot-create, rubrik-polaris-vm-object-metadata-get, servicenow-add-comment, servicenow-create-ticket, servicenow-update-ticket.
